seoTitle: San Francisco Unified School District Calendar 2027-2028: Key Dates & PDF
seoDescription: View the SFUSD 2027-2028 calendar with Aug 16 first day, Jun 1 last day, recesses, holidays, official PDF and ICS download.
instructionalDaysDescription: The official SFUSD 2027-2028 academic calendar lists 180 total student days, with 82 fall instructional days and 98 spring instructional days.
calendarNotes: This page summarizes major student dates from the approved SFUSD 2027-2028 district-wide academic calendar. It may not include every staff work-calendar detail, professional development item, early education exception, or school-specific change.

calendarFaqs.q: When does San Francisco Unified start school in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: San Francisco Unified students start the 2027-2028 school year on Monday, August 16, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for SFUSD in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of spring instruction on the SFUSD 2027-2028 academic calendar is Thursday, June 1, 2028.

calendarFaqs.q: When is SFUSD Spring Recess in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Recess on the SFUSD 2027-2028 academic calendar runs Friday, March 24 through Friday, March 31, 2028. Students return Monday, April 3, 2028.

yearNumbers.label: Fall Instruction
yearNumbers.detail: The official SFUSD calendar lists 82 fall instructional days.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Instruction
yearNumbers.detail: The official SFUSD calendar lists 98 spring instructional days.

whatsNew.title: Changes from the 2026-2027 Calendar
content: The first day moves from August 17 in 2026-2027 to August 16 in 2027-2028.
The last day moves from June 2 in 2026-2027 to June 1 in 2027-2028.
Fall Recess changes from November 23-27 in 2026-2027 to November 22-26 in 2027-2028.
Spring Recess moves from March 26-April 2 in 2026-2027 to March 24-31 in 2027-2028.

sourceVersion: ENGLISH (Approved) - SFUSD 2027-28 SY Academic Calendar PDF
